<!-- @generated by usage-cli from usage spec -->
# `git-attributes`

Check .gitattributes coverage and suggest missing rules


- **Usage**: `git-attributes [FLAGS]`

## Flags

### `-h --help`

Show help

### `-v --verbose`

Verbose output

### `-e --exit`

Exit with error if uncovered files found

### `-p --pattern`

Show pattern matches

### `-n --no-suggest`

Skip suggestions

### `-w --write`

Write suggested rules to .gitattributes

### `-f --format-width <width>`

Format column width
